title: Inside the Trailer
description: Experience Minecraft as if you were inside the trailers
body:
## Enter the Minecraft trailers | Only in ~~Theaters~~ your PC.


Inside the Trailer aims to bring vanilla Minecraft as close as possible to the **atmosphere and feel of Minecraft trailers**, so that you really feel like you're inside one.

This is done by **modifying the visuals, audio, animations and other minor aspects**, without adding any changes to the gameplay and thus keeping the modpack **client-side**, meaning you can use it on your favorite servers, even if it doesn't have the modpack installed.

## Gameplay footage
All the **gameplay footage** is available on the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/modpack/inside-the-trailer/gallery) tab.
![In-game screeshot of a Vindicator attacking a Villager while using Inside the Trailer modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81deb41ba6b937284570ebff647ec51fbce25499.png)

## Features
The following list of features applies to the latest version of the modpack (2.0.0):
### ★ Main
- [**Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) with **customized by hand settings** to make the gameplay as similar as possible to the Minecraft trailers
- [**Textures**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) inspired by the trailers
- [**88% of mobs with animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) inspired by the trailers
- **Great performance**

### 👁 Visual
- New **particles** for ambience, cave dust and others
- New **water effects** (splashes, droplets, ripples, waterfall clouds and mist, ...)
- **Bubble particles** in the water rise to the surface of the water and **pop**
- **Chests** open underwater **emit bubbles**
- ~~**Glow squids hypnotize** (attract the cursor)~~ (temporarily removed in 2.0.0)
- First-person **camera more realistic** (toggleable)
- You can see your **body on first-person view** (toggleable by pressing F6)
- **Screen shakes** effects (for explosions, Warden roars and sonic booms, Ravager roars and Ender Dragon roars)
- **Snow under the trees**
- **Cloud formations** similar to those in trailers
- **Soul fire** appears correctly when a player is on fire
- **Arrows with 2D model** similarly to the trailers
- ~~**Mobs don't flash red when hitted**, as in the trailers~~ (temporarily removed in 2.0.0)
- **Fluids fade in the void**
- **Animated chunk generation**

### ♫ Audio
- **Sounds physics**
- New **ambient** and **footstep sounds**
- New **sound effects** when opening interfaces, moving items in inventories, changing the active hotbar slot, dropping items, typing in chat, earning achievements...
- More **Villager speech sounds**

### 〰 Animations
- **Player** with more animations
- Animations for **block placement** inspired by the trailers
- Animations for **block breaking**
- **Eating** animations
- **[Boats, ~~chests~~ and minecarts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions)** with animations
- ~~**Doors, gates, trapdoors and levers** with animations~~ (temporarily removed in 1.1.0)
- **Interfaces** with animations when opened and closed
- **Items** are animated when carried and hovered over in the inventory
- **Falling blocks** are rotated to the direction they're falling towards

### ☰ Other
- **Dynamic hotbar**, allowing an appreciation of the game's visuals (toggleable by pressing H)
- Enhanced **3rd person** view
- **Main Menu background is now an animation**, based on the Minecraft official videos outro
- **Animated intro when you enter the game**, based on the official Mojang Studios logo animation
- **Fish swim in schools**
- Better **bossbars** textures
- **Armor** is rendered in **first-person view**
- Details about armor in the armor bar
- **Potency indicator** and **countdown overlay** in **status effect icons**
- **Controller support**
- LAN servers can be opened for anyone you want
- **Chat** is **animated** and has new features such as being able to **copy messages**.
- **Messages** are indicated with player heads
- **Resource packs**, **datapacks**, **servers** and **worlds** are now **draggable**
- **Searchable keybinds**
- OptiFine **capes support**
- **Z-fighting fixes**
- And more...

In addition to the shaders, other mods have their **configurations customized by hand** to better fit the modpack.

---

Inside the Trailer is **currently only available on Modrinth**. Don't download it from another source.
